regions.name: The Sprawl
regions.description: A canyon of megatowers under permanent rain, lit by a thousand holo-signs. Steam, noise, and crowds that part for no one — and above it all, the arcology's white spire.

environmentalCodes.description: Everything drowned in shifting neon and sign-glare — bright, and nowhere truly lit.

nodes.name: Neon Alley
nodes.description: A dripping back-alley of noodle vendors and data-fences, thick with acid smog off the stacks. A ladder climbs toward the night market.

environmentalCodes.description: Chemical smog pools in the alley — it burns to breathe for long.

nodes.name: The Night Market
nodes.description: A heaving bazaar of chrome, chipware, and stolen goods under tarps and strung lights. Easy to disappear into, easy to be cornered in.

nodes.name: Arcology Lobby
nodes.description: The cold marble threshold of the corporate spire — mirror-glass, silent guards, and the front desk Nyx's debt is owed to. Kade waits here.
